languages.text: "Разумное решение. У вас нет такой закалки как у нас". {n}Судя по тону Батошски "разумное решение" — это оскорбление.{/n}
"A sensible decision. You don't have the kind of conditioning we do." {n}Judging by Batoshski's tone, "a sensible decision" was intended as an insult.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Разумное решение. У вас нет такой закалки как у нас". {n}Судя по тону Батошски "разумное решение" — это оскорбление.{/n}

"A sensible decision. You don't have the kind of conditioning we do." {n}Judging by Batoshski's tone, "a sensible decision" was intended as an insult.{/n}
"A sensible decision. We accustom ourselves to poisons from childhood by administering microdoses. You don't have that kind of conditioning."
"A sensible decision. You don't have the kind of conditioning we do." {n}Judging by Batoshski's tone, "a sensible decision" was intended as an insult.{/n}
"A sensible decision. You don't have the kind of conditioning we do." {n}Judging by Batoshski's tone, "a sensible decision" was intended as an insult.{/n}
"A sensible decision. You don't have the kind of conditioning we do." {n}Judging by Batoshski's tone, "a sensible decision" was intended as an insult.{/n}

languages.text: 「賢明な判断だ。我々は幼い頃から微量を投与して毒に慣らす。あなたにはそうした耐性づけがない」
languages.original_text: "A sensible decision. We accustom ourselves to poisons from childhood by administering microdoses. You don't have that kind of conditioning."

traits.locale_text: 「賢明な判断だ。我々は幼い頃から微量を投与して毒に慣らす。あなたにはそうした耐性づけがない。」

languages.text: « Sage décision. Vous ne bénéficiez pas du même conditionnement que nous. » {n}À en juger par le ton qu'il emploie, l'expression "sage décision" constitue une insulte à votre endroit.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A sensible decision. You don't have the kind of conditioning we do." {n}Judging by Batoshski's tone, "a sensible decision" was intended as an insult.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Sage décision. Vous ne bénéficiez pas du même conditionnement que nous. » {n}À en juger par le ton qu'il emploie, l'expression "sage décision" constitue une insulte à votre endroit.{/n}

languages.text: "Mantıklı bir karar. Bizim gibi şartlandırılmadınız." {n}Batoshski'nin ses tonu, "mantıklı bir karar" söyleminin hakaret olarak söylendiğini gösteriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A sensible decision. You don't have the kind of conditioning we do." {n}Judging by Batoshski's tone, "a sensible decision" was intended as an insult.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Mantıklı bir karar. Bizim gibi şartlandırılmadınız." {n}Batoshski'nin ses tonu, "mantıklı bir karar" söyleminin hakaret olarak söylendiğini gösteriyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Una decisión sensata. Carece usted de nuestro condicionamiento». {n}A juzgar por el tono de Batoshski, eso de «una decisión sensata» ha sido más un insulto que otra cosa.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A sensible decision. You don't have the kind of conditioning we do." {n}Judging by Batoshski's tone, "a sensible decision" was intended as an insult.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Una decisión sensata. Carece usted de nuestro condicionamiento». {n}A juzgar por el tono de Batoshski, eso de «una decisión sensata» ha sido más un insulto que otra cosa.{/n}

languages.text: “明智的决定。您没有我们这样的体质。”{n}听巴托什斯基的语气，“明智的决定”更像是在讽刺你。{/n}
languages.original_text: "A sensible decision. You don't have the kind of conditioning we do." {n}Judging by Batoshski's tone, "a sensible decision" was intended as an insult.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “明智的决定。您没有我们这样的体质。”{n}听巴托什斯基的语气，“明智的决定”更像是在讽刺你。{/n}

languages.text: "Eine vernünftige Entscheidung. Euch fehlt unsere Konditionierung." {n}Batoshskis Ton nach zu urteilen, war 'eine kluge Entscheidung' als Beleidigung gedacht.{/n}
